phase: Phase 1 — extract PRNewswire 2025-03 SC tau_2 numeric

webfetch_attempt.result_summary: No specific numeric values for tau_2 (T2 dephasing time), decoherence time, collapse time, or other quantum coherence timescales reported. Press release describes methodology (testing on a single bit on an IBM Eagle chip, using LLMs to generate quantum code) but contains no quantitative coherence metrics.
webfetch_attempt.notes: Release states 'a GitHub repository will be available shortly' — detailed technical data deferred to forthcoming repo or peer-reviewed publication.

extraction_outcome: FAIL — PRNewswire 2025-03 release contains no extractable tau_2 numeric. The N-12 v1 EXEC report's 100us placeholder remains unverified; no improved value can be substituted from the cited source.

ibm_eagle_T2_typical_us.source: IBM Quantum public T2 reports for Eagle r3 generation (2023-2024); accessed via general literature, not extracted from PRNewswire
ibm_eagle_T2_typical_us.confidence: indicative range, not specific to the Valis/Tagg experiment described in PRNewswire

fallback_options_considered.decision: Even with this fallback range, the v2 measurement cannot produce a defensible verdict because Phase 2 (real delay on Forte 1) is not executable — see forte1_capability_probe.json. No SC reference value substitution is meaningful when the ion-side measurement cannot be obtained.
